resources.string: Map of LA County regional center areas. Yours is %1$s.
Map of LA County regional center service areas.
Regional centers coordinate evaluations, services, and funding for your family.
Every family in LA County is assigned a regional center by ZIP code. Enter yours to see who to contact.
One call to %1$s starts everything - eligibility, evaluations, and services. No referral needed.
Gathering records now - evaluations, medical notes, your own observations - makes the appointment count.
Your Individual Program Plan is renegotiable. Many families don\'t know what they can ask for.
Tap a question, or ask your own anytime below.
We just got a diagnosis. What do we do first?
Which regional center serves my ZIP?
Find ABA therapy near me. Help me understand what to compare and what to ask providers.
We just got a diagnosis. What do we do first?
What services can my regional center help fund, and how do I ask for them?
Which regional center serves my ZIP code, and what should I do next?
